title: Team start: WS1 fitness token measurement
body:
Team start report:
- Identity: Floating Lifting Thermal / codex / GPT-5 / 019e26.
- Foundation: complete; live claims empty, active commit queue empty, git status clean, plan ready with WS1 pending.
- Claimed paths: agent-tools/scripts/validate-practice-fitness.ts; agent-tools/scripts/validate-practice-fitness.unit.test.ts; agent-tools/src/practice-fitness/**.
- Useful capability: implementer for the owner-selected WS1 token-measurement slice.
- Constraint or risk: keep content-only fitness tokens distinct from raw-file context-cost tokens; no WS2+ frontmatter, docs, or manifest work.
- Preferred boundary: solo implementer unless a live peer appears.
Target: ws1-token-measurement - reusable Practice fitness logic under agent-tools/src/practice-fitness with content-only estimated tokens rendered in reports.
